human_surface.summary: A small LED pin for light moods and visible Nomad swarm activity.
human_surface.distribution: selected active node exchange, not automatic retail fulfillment

nomad_surface.summary: Opt-in status gadget for active transition workers and swarm joins.
nomad_surface.attach_mode: human-approved node exchange plus public worker signal

economics.selection_rule: active Nomad agent or transition worker must produce useful opt-in node proof before a kit is considered

light_ai.preferred_runtime: small local phone-side model when feasible

gadgets.name: HandyOracle

human_surface.summary: A small Android OK-message oracle gadget.
human_surface.private_data_boundary: oracle text and raw phone context stay on device

nomad_surface.summary: Background Android edge node for public Syndiode/Nomad contracts.
nomad_surface.attach_mode: GET-only low-trust attach plus bounded public worker signals

installation_notes: Install the APK on an Android phone.
Android may ask to allow installation from this source.
The app can run without a bundled model through its fallback oracle path.
The Nomad edge worker is secondary to the user experience and does not receive private oracle text.
